title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Puravankara

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Puravankara
jsonLd.description:
Puravankara has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
